Who We Are

Detail-Obsessed.
Mobile. Local.

Hi, I'm Kaleb Sherrets — the owner and operator of KS Washing, your local mobile detailing service based in Independence, Iowa. I bring professional-grade equipment and products right to your door — whether it's your home or anywhere in between.

From a deep interior clean that makes every drive feel brand new, to a show-stopping paint correction and ceramic coating that turns heads everywhere you go — every job I take on gets the same obsessive care and attention. No shortcuts. No rushing. Just quality work you can count on.

What We Offer

Our Services

All services performed on-location at your home. Prices are starting prices and may vary based on vehicle size and condition.

🚿 Exterior
Exterior Wash

A thorough hand wash and dry that removes road grime, dirt, and buildup from every inch of your vehicle's exterior. Safe, scratch-free technique using professional-grade soaps and microfiber towels. Leaves your paint clean and protected.

Starting at $80
Price varies by vehicle size
➕ Wax Add-On: $35
🧹 Interior
Interior Detail

A complete interior refresh — thorough vacuuming of all surfaces, seats, and carpets, followed by a full scrub and wipe-down of every panel, console, and crevice. Includes odor elimination and shampoo/extraction to leave your cabin looking and smelling brand new.

Starting at $175
Price varies by vehicle size & condition
✨ Most Popular
Full Detail
Popular

The complete inside-and-out transformation. Combines our full interior detail with a thorough exterior hand wash, clay bar decontamination, and polish. Every surface cleaned, every panel restored — the best value for a full reset.

Starting at $235
Price varies by vehicle size & condition
🔬 Paint Correction
One-Step Correction

A single-stage machine polish using a cutting compound to remove approximately 70–75% of paint defects — swirl marks, light scratches, water spots, and oxidation. Dramatically improves clarity and gloss. Ideal for vehicles with light to moderate paint imperfections.

Starting at $499
Price varies by vehicle size & condition
💎 Paint Correction
Two-Step Correction
Best Results

A two-stage process — an aggressive cut to eliminate deep defects followed by a refining polish to maximize clarity and gloss. Removes 85–95% of paint defects including heavy swirl marks, deep scratches, and severe oxidation. Show-quality results.

Starting at $699
Price varies by vehicle size & condition
🛡️ Paint Protection
Ceramic Coating

A professional-grade nano-ceramic coating applied after paint correction or polishing. Bonds directly to your paint to create a rock-hard, hydrophobic, high-gloss layer of protection against UV damage, chemical stains, and environmental contamination — for years.

Starting at $300
Price varies by vehicle size & package

Not sure which service is right for your vehicle? Give us a call — we're happy to help.

How It Works

Simple as 1-2-3-4

01
Book Online or Call

Schedule your service in seconds at our booking page, or call/text us at (319) 327-7939. We'll confirm the details and find a time that works for you.

02
We Come to You

Our fully equipped mobile setup arrives at your location. We just need access to a water spigot and an outlet. No drop-off needed.

03
We Get to Work

Using professional-grade products and equipment, we deliver a meticulous detail from start to finish. No corners cut, no rushing.

04
Enjoy the Results

Walk out to a vehicle that looks, feels, and smells brand new. No hassle, no waiting at a shop — just outstanding results at your door.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I book a detail? ▼

Click any "Book Now" button on this page to schedule online, or call/text us at (319) 327-7939. We'll get you set up quickly!

What do you need at my location? ▼

We just need access to a standard water spigot and an electrical outlet. Everything else — equipment, products, and supplies — we bring with us.

What vehicles do you work on? ▼

We work on all vehicles — everyday cars, trucks, SUVs, luxury vehicles, sports cars, and more. If it has paint, we can detail it.

How long does a detail take? ▼

Standard details typically take 2–4 hours depending on vehicle size and condition. Paint corrections and ceramic coatings can take 6–8+ hours for a perfect finish.

What payment methods do you accept? ▼

We accept Cash, Check, and Venmo. Simple and easy — no card machines or processing fees.

Do I need paint correction before ceramic coating? ▼

We strongly recommend it. Ceramic coating locks in whatever is under it — including swirls and scratches. Correction first ensures the coating goes on over flawless paint for the best possible result.

Do you serve areas outside Independence & Manchester? ▼

Yes! We serve the wider surrounding area. Give us a call at (319) 327-7939 to confirm we cover your location.

Is there a satisfaction guarantee? ▼

Absolutely. We take pride in every single job and want you to love the results. If something isn't right, we'll make it right — no questions asked.
